title: EquiPal
subheading: Your best friend for managing your horse life 🐎
description: This android app is my personal project, serving as an activity tracker helping you to save and evaluate workout sessions, rest days and more for your horse. Some functionality includes:
list: 🏇 Choose between several types of acitivities
📝 Evaluate the feeling, exertion and add notes
📊 See statistics over the past month

title: SunSip
description: During my internship i worked with a team on a webshop that sells beverages. I worked both in the front- and backend. Some of my tasks included:
list: ⚙️ Handling membership functionality like login, register, favourites and user profiles
🍹 Product pages with items fetched from the CMS
